definition: Maximum amount the insurer will pay for a claim during the policy period
The amount paid periodically to keep the insurance policy active
A formal request to the insurance company for payment under the policy
The contract between the insured and the insurer
The percentage of claim amount the policyholder must pay from their own pocket
The fixed amount the policyholder pays before insurance coverage kicks in
Treatment at a network hospital where the insurer directly settles the bill
The insurer pays back the policyholder after they have paid the hospital bills
Hospitals that have a tie-up with the insurer for cashless treatment
Company that processes claims on behalf of the insurance company
Duration after policy purchase during which certain conditions are not covered
Any condition that existed before the policy was purchased
Admission to a hospital for at least 24 hours for treatment
Severe diseases like cancer, heart attack, stroke covered under specific riders
Additional coverage that can be added to a base insurance policy
A cap on specific expenses within the overall sum insured
Daily limit on hospital room charges covered by the policy
Increase in sum insured or discount on premium for claim-free years
Conditions, treatments, or situations not covered by the policy

hinglish: maturity benefit / policy puri hone par milne wala paisa
definition: Amount paid to the policyholder when the policy term ends

hinglish: surrender value / policy todne par milne wala paisa
definition: Amount received when a life insurance policy is terminated before maturity
Life insurance that pays death benefit only, no maturity benefit
Life insurance with savings component, pays on death or maturity
Unit Linked Insurance Plan — combines insurance with market investments
Person designated to receive the insurance payout on the policyholder's death

hinglish: grace period / premium bharme ki chhut
definition: Extra time allowed to pay the premium after the due date without policy lapse
When a policy becomes inactive due to non-payment of premiums

hinglish: revival / band policy dubara shuru karna
definition: Reinstating a lapsed policy by paying overdue premiums with interest

hinglish: free look period / policy cancel karne ka time
definition: 15-30 days after receiving policy to review and return it for full refund

hinglish: portability / ek company se dusri mein shift
definition: Transfer health insurance from one insurer to another retaining benefits

hinglish: moratorium / 8 saal ke baad sab cover
definition: After 8 years of continuous coverage, insurer cannot reject claims for non-disclosure

hindi: भारतीय बीमा विनियामक और विकास प्राधिकरण
definition: Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India — the regulator

hinglish: CSR / kitne claims approve hote hain
definition: Percentage of claims settled by an insurer out of total claims received

hinglish: ICR / premium ka kitna claims mein gaya
definition: Ratio of claims paid to premiums collected — indicates insurer's risk exposure

hinglish: solvency ratio / company ki financial health
definition: Insurer's ability to meet long-term obligations, minimum 1.5x required by IRDAI

hinglish: day care / bina bharti ke ilaaj
definition: Treatment that requires less than 24 hours of hospitalisation
Treatment at home when hospitalisation is not possible

hinglish: OPD cover / bina bharti ke doctor visit
definition: Coverage for outpatient consultations, diagnostics, and pharmacy

hinglish: restoration / sum insured dubara mil jana
definition: Sum insured gets restored after it is exhausted by a claim

hinglish: cumulative bonus / har saal badhne wala cover
definition: Additional sum insured added for each claim-free year, accumulated over time

hinglish: top-up plan / extra cover sasta mein
definition: Additional health cover with a deductible, cheaper than increasing base policy

hinglish: super top-up / aggregate deductible wala plan
definition: Like top-up but deductible is calculated on aggregate claims, not per claim

hinglish: family floater / puri family ka ek policy
definition: Single health policy covering the entire family with shared sum insured

hinglish: individual plan / ek insaan ki policy
definition: Health policy covering only one person with dedicated sum insured
Coverage for death or disability caused by accidents

hinglish: third party / dusre ko nuksan ka cover
definition: Mandatory motor insurance covering damage caused to others
Motor insurance covering damage to your own vehicle
Motor insurance combining both third party and own damage coverage
Insured Declared Value — current market value of the vehicle for insurance
Income tax deduction up to ₹1.5 lakh for life insurance premiums
Income tax deduction up to ₹25K (₹50K for seniors) for health insurance premiums
Tax exemption on maturity proceeds of life insurance policies
Independent authority to resolve insurance complaints up to ₹50 lakh
Formal complaint against an insurer for service failure or claim rejection
Process of evaluating risk before issuing or renewing an insurance policy
Professional who calculates insurance risks and premiums using statistics
Official modification or addition to an existing insurance policy

hinglish: assignment / policy kisi aur ko transfer
definition: Transfer of policy rights from one person to another

hinglish: annuity / retirement ke baad regular income
definition: Regular periodic payment from an insurance company, typically after retirement
Insurance plan that provides regular income after retirement

hinglish: money back / beech beech mein paisa milta hai
definition: Life insurance plan that pays periodic survival benefits during the policy term

hinglish: whole life / zindagi bhar ka cover
definition: Life insurance that covers you for your entire lifetime, not a fixed term

hinglish: paid-up / premium band karo par policy chale
definition: Reduced cover that continues when you stop paying premiums on a life policy
Additional amount added to life insurance sum assured from insurer's profits

hinglish: vesting age / pension shuru hone ki umar
definition: Age at which pension plan benefits become payable
Internal Rate of Return — the real annual return on an insurance investment

hinglish: EAZR Score / policy ki overall rating
definition: EAZR's proprietary protection score rating the quality of an insurance policy
Insurance Premium Financing — pay premiums in EMIs instead of lump sum
Surrender Value Financing — loan against policy surrender value as alternative to surrendering
When the insurer refuses to pay a submitted claim

hinglish: claim settlement / claim ka paisa milna
definition: Process by which insurer processes and pays an approved claim
Approval from insurer before cashless treatment at a network hospital

hinglish: discharge summary / hospital se chutti ka paper
definition: Hospital document summarizing treatment, required for claim submission

hinglish: Bima Sugam / insurance ka digital platform
definition: IRDAI's upcoming digital platform for buying and managing insurance policies
Electronic Insurance Account — digital repository for all your insurance policies
Ayushman Bharat Health Account — unique health identity for insurance portability

hinglish: co-insurance / multiple companies ka shared cover
definition: Risk shared between multiple insurers for large sum insured
Insurance purchased by an insurance company to manage its own risk
Additional premium charged for higher risk factors like age or health conditions
Failure to disclose important health or personal information while buying policy
Application form filled when buying insurance, basis for the policy contract

hinglish: policy schedule / policy ka summary page
definition: Summary page of the policy listing key details like SI, premium, dates, members
Continuation of an insurance policy by paying the next period's premium

hinglish: lifelong renewal / zindagi bhar renew ho sakti hai
definition: Health insurance cannot be refused renewal by the insurer regardless of claims
Coverage for ambulance charges to transport patient to hospital

hinglish: mental health cover / dimagi bimari ka ilaaj
definition: Coverage for mental health treatment, mandatory in health insurance since 2022
Coverage for Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani, Siddha, and Homeopathy treatments
Weight loss surgery, covered by some health insurance plans
Regular kidney treatment covered under health insurance day care procedures

hinglish: organ donor cover / donor ka ilaaj ka kharcha
definition: Coverage for medical expenses of the organ donor during transplant
Coverage for pregnancy and childbirth expenses, usually with a waiting period

hinglish: newborn cover / naye bachche ka insurance
definition: Coverage for newborn baby from day one, available with maternity cover
Disease present from birth, covered after waiting period in health insurance

hinglish: ADB / accident mein maut pe extra paisa
definition: Additional payout if death is caused by an accident
Rider that waives future premiums if policyholder becomes disabled
Free or discounted health check-up benefit offered with health insurance

hinglish: permanent disability / hamesha ke liye disabled
definition: Total or partial loss of body function covered under PA or life insurance

hinglish: temporary disability / kuch samay ke liye disabled
definition: Temporary loss of earning capacity due to accident, covered under PA insurance
Legal forum where insurance complaints can be filed if ombudsman does not resolve
